inputs.transcript_excerpt: [41.0 - 44.0] Most people think saving money means cutting the fun stuff. [44.0 - 52.0] But the real leak is the subscriptions you forgot you have. [52.0 - 63.0] I audited mine and found forty-one dollars a month bleeding out for apps I never open. [63.0 - 74.0] So here's the three-minute audit that got me almost five hundred dollars a year back.

clips.title: The $41/month leak you forgot about
clips.reason: Hook (contrarian 'saving isn't cutting fun') at 41s lands in the first 3s; extends to the payoff (the three-minute audit + $500/yr) at 74s — complete standalone thought.
